phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o bilhete do elétrico?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW bee-LYEH-tih DOO eh-LEHT-ree-koo?

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque do café?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DOO kuh-FEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional iron kiosks serve as social hubs at Lisbon viewpoints.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no terraço de ferro forjado.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO teh-RAH-soo DIH FEH-roo foo-ruh-ZHAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, on the wrought iron terrace.

responses.english: Good morning, on the wrought iron terrace.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO teh-RAH-soo DIH FEH-roo foo-ruh-ZHAH-doo.
responses.local: Bom dia, no terraço de ferro forjado.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the St. Vincent's Church view?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a vista para a Igreja de São Vicente?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah ah-zVEES-tah PAH-rah ah ee-GREH-zhah jee SOW vee-SEN-chee
phrases.cultural_note: Viewpoints in Lisbon rely on visual landmarks for navigation.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto ao parapede de pedra branca.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW puh-ruh-PEH-dih DIH PEHD-ruh BRAHNNG-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the white stone balustrade.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the white stone balustrade.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW puh-ruh-PEH-dih DIH PEHD-ruh BRAHNNG-kuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, junto ao parapede de pedra branca.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the Graça Square stairs?
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as escadas da Praça da Graça?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH SHKAH-duhsh DUH PRAH-suh DUH GRAH-suh?
phrases.cultural_note: Direct routes are preferred over scenic detours by staff.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as escadas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH SHKAH-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the stairs.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the stairs.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH SHKAH-duhsh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as escadas.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Fonte da Graça?
phrases.text_local: Onde está a Fonte da Graça?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH FOHNG-tih DUH GRAH-suh?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic fountains mark gathering spots in Alfama and Graça.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, a Fonte da Graça está no terraço do quiosque de ferro.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH FOHNG-tih DUH GRAH-suh ehs-TAH NOO teh-RAH-soo DOO KEEOHSH-kih DIH FEH-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the Fonte da Graça is on the terrace with the iron kiosk.

responses.english: Good morning, the Fonte da Graça is on the terrace with the iron kiosk.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH FOHNG-tih DUH GRAH-suh ehs-TAH NOO teh-RAH-soo DOO KEEOHSH-kih DIH FEH-roo.
responses.local: Bom dia, a Fonte da Graça está no terraço do quiosque de ferro.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o terraço do quiosque de ferro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW teh-RAH-soo DOO KEEOHSH-kih DIH FEH-roo?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao barista no quiosque de ferro.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW buh-REESH-tuh NOO KEEOHSH-kih DIH FEH-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the barista at the iron kiosk.

responses.english: Ask the barista at the iron kiosk.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW buh-REESH-tuh NOO KEEOHSH-kih DIH FEH-roo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao barista no quiosque de ferro.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I validate my tram 12E ticket?
phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde é que valido o bilhete do elétrico 12E?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih EH KIH vuh-LEE-doo AW bee-LYEH-tih DOO eh-LEHT-ree-koo DOH-zih EH?
phrases.cultural_note: Os elétricos de Lisboa exigem validação do bilhete antes de embarcar, normalmente num validador junto à paragem.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, pergunte ao condutor ou ao fiscal de bilhetes.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW koong-doo-TOHR OHW OW feesh-KAHL DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, please ask the conductor or the ticket inspector.

responses.english: Good morning, please ask the conductor or the ticket inspector.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW koong-doo-TOHR OHW OW feesh-KAHL DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh.
responses.local: Bom dia, pergunte ao condutor ou ao fiscal de bilhetes.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o terraço de ferro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW teh-RAH-soo DIH FEH-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: The iron kiosk terrace is a popular spot for photos and drinks, often crowded at sunset.

likely_response.local: Ao lado do quiosque, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW LAH-doo DOO KEEOHSH-kih, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the kiosk, on the right.

responses.english: Next to the kiosk, on the right.
responses.phonetic: OW LAH-doo DOO KEEOHSH-kih, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: Ao lado do quiosque, à direita.

phrases.text_local: Posso subir na balaustrada de pedra branca?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-soo soo-BEER NUH buh-lowsht-RAH-duh DIH PEHD-ruh BRAHNNG-kuh?

likely_response.local: Não, é proibido subir na balaustrada de pedra branca.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOWN, EH proy-BEE-doo soo-BEER NUH buh-lowsht-RAH-duh DIH PEHD-ruh BRAHNNG-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: No, it is forbidden to climb the white stone balustrade.

responses.english: No, it is forbidden to climb the white stone balustrade.
responses.phonetic: NOWN, EH proy-BEE-doo soo-BEER NUH buh-lowsht-RAH-duh DIH PEHD-ruh BRAHNNG-kuh.
responses.local: Não, é proibido subir na balaustrada de pedra branca.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the Graça Square stairs?
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as escadas da Praça da Graça?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee es-TOW-zahsh es-KA-dahsh dah PRAH-sah dah GRAH-sah
phrases.cultural_note: Historic quarters use stairways as primary pedestrian routes.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as escadas da Praça da Graça.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH SHKAH-duhsh DUH PRAH-suh DUH GRAH-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Graça Square stairs.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Graça Square stairs.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH SHKAH-duhsh DUH PRAH-suh DUH GRAH-suh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as escadas da Praça da Graça.
